events.name: F✦FOREVER 1st World Tour (F4 + Ashin)
events.attendees: ~12,000/night x 3 nights; regional Mandopop inbound, presale sold out
events.rationale: Three consecutive sold-out Indoor Stadium nights; F4 (Jerry Yan, Van Ness Wu, Vic Chou) plus Ashin of Mayday draw affluent adult Mandopop fans from Taiwan/Malaysia/Indonesia who stay overnight. Indoor Stadium scale (~12k) caps compression versus a national-stadium act, so Moderate rather than High.
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. Kampong Glam, City Hall (Kallang proximity)

events.name: Singapore IP Week 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.attendees: ~2,000-3,000 international IP professionals, officials and delegates
events.rationale: IPOS flagship conference (15th edition) with international senior professional attendance staying 2-3 nights near CBD; modest absolute room-night volume but ideal adults-only overnight profile. Fills a late-August window.

events.name: BEX Asia 2026 (Built Environment Expo)
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.attendees: ~10,000; 250+ global brands, mix of regional delegates and local day-attendees
events.rationale: 3-day trade show with a meaningful regional overnight component, but a significant local day-attendee share dilutes room-night impact; past editions produced modest, not heavy, compression.

events.name: Submarine Networks World 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.rationale: Small but almost entirely international senior-exec crowd staying 2-3 nights; modest absolute room-night volume caps it at Moderate despite ideal attendee type.

events.name: Post Malone - BIG ASS Stadium World Tour
events.rationale: Single-night stadium show on a Friday; only SEA stop draws Malaysia/Indonesia flyers who stay 1-2 nights. Adult demographic fits adults-only properties.
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. Kampong Glam, City Hall (Kallang proximity)

events.name: The Weeknd - After Hours Til Dawn Tour (2 nights)
events.attendees: ~55,000/night, strong regional inbound (SEA fans fly in)
events.rationale: Two-night stadium act; comparable stadium concerts (Coldplay, Taylor Swift 2024) materialized into citywide occupancy spikes. Adult audience staying overnight. ITZY at Indoor Stadium Oct 3 stacks the same weekend.
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. Kampong Glam, City Hall (Kallang proximity)

events.name: ITZY World Tour
events.rationale: Mid-size K-pop show, but stacks on The Weeknd's Oct 2-3 stadium weekend - combined citywide effect makes that weekend a hold-rates window.
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. Kampong Glam, City Hall (Kallang proximity)

events.name: TOKEN2049 Singapore 2026 (+ TOKEN2049 Week side events)
events.rationale: One of the CBD's biggest compression events: 25,000+ high-spend international adults plus a week of side events/parties across Chinatown, Quays and Marina Bay, with the After2049 party Oct 9. Directly precedes the F1 weekend (Oct 9-11), creating a continuous Oct 7-11 sell-out block - the single strongest hold-and-raise window of the quarter. Historically fills boutique/aparthotel inventory citywide.
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. City Hall, Quays, Chinatown

events.name: F1 Singapore Grand Prix 2026 (night race + trackside concerts)
events.attendees: ~260,000 over race weekend, heavily international adults
events.rationale: Strongest annual compression event for CBD; Oct 2025 race weekend drove citywide occupancy to 95.9% and record ADR (~SGD 384). First Sprint-format Singapore GP adds Friday demand, and the Padang concert lineup (Lana Del Rey, The Killers, Zara Larsson, JJ Lin) deepens the draw. International overnight adults - ideal Heritage Collection profile. Back-to-back with TOKEN2049.
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. City Hall, Quays (Marina Bay adjacency)

events.name: LANY - Asia Tour
events.rationale: LANY has an outsized SEA following; a Saturday National Stadium date draws regional young-adult fans for weekend stays. Falls the weekend after the F1/TOKEN2049 block, so incremental rather than compounding. (Replaces a prior mis-dated Stray Kids entry - Stray Kids' Singapore dates are March 2027 at Indoor Stadium, out of window.)
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. Kampong Glam, City Hall (Kallang proximity)

events.name: ITB Asia 2026 (Asia's largest B2B travel trade show)
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.rationale: Multi-day international corporate delegates staying 3-4 nights near CBD; travel-trade buyers routinely book boutique/aparthotel product. Consistent year-on-year occupancy materialization.

events.name: Singapore International Energy Week 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.attendees: ~15,000+ international energy executives and delegates from 100+ countries
events.rationale: Week-long government-backed conference with international senior-executive attendance; multi-night CBD stays. Just past the 3-month window but included for forward pricing visibility.

events.name: BTS World Tour 'ARIRANG' (4 nights)
events.attendees: ~200,000+ across 4 nights, heavy international ARMY inbound
events.rationale: First BTS full-group show in Singapore in seven years and their longest Asia stop outside Korea/Japan (4 nights: Dec 17, 19, 20, 22). Well beyond the 3-month window but flagged now because it is an exceptional citywide compression event that sells out hotels months in advance - start holding/raising December rates now.
events.best_fit: Citywide; esp. Kampong Glam, City Hall (Kallang proximity)
